data.content: Shipment review approved. All 4 commits verified on main (bd8c49e..c084440). CI green (3/3 runs passed). make sanity passes with 95.07% coverage (+0.01%). Implementation correctly adds terminal_parents doctor check and --fix support with shipped>deferred>abandoned priority logic. Recursive resolution via loop handles grandparent chains. Comprehensive unit and CLI integration tests cover all cases. No regressions detected.
